channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « On ne sent pas que c’est un robot qui conduit » : j’ai testé Zoox, l’étonnant robot-taxi sans volant d’Amazon
item.description: Nous avons testé le Zoox, le tout nouveau service de taxi autonome développé par le géant américain. Ce curieux véhicule électrique dénué de volant et de pédales nous a embarqués dans les rues de Las Vegas pour une expérience déroutante. Voici notre vidéo.

item.title: Notorious online data leak market BreachForums taken down by whitehat heroes
item.description: BreachForums is no more - but for how long?

item.title: Ikea tried to build a smart home for everyone — here’s why it’s not working yet
item.description: Ikea's new Matter-over-Thread products were supposed to prove that the smart home could be cheap, accessible, and reliable. The highly anticipated line - which includes sensors, remotes, smart plugs, air-quality monitors, and smart bulbs - has most everything you need to build a smart home, with prices starting at $6. It's an exciting idea, but […]

item.title: Trump Advisor Says Pain for U.S. Consumers ‘Last of Our Concerns’ as Other Countries Start Gas Rationing
item.description: Kevin Hassett claims the war will last 4-6 weeks.

item.title: “People aren’t put off by ‘used’ — they’re put off by uncertainty”: How the smartphone industry can build trust in refurbished devices
item.description: Most smartphones still work when retired, yet fewer than 10% are refurbished — how can the industry close the gap?

item.title: Dell Vostro Tower is the gold standard for 'no-frills' professional reliability - and it’s $320 off right now in an early Amazon Spring Deal
item.description: The Dell Vostro Tower Business Desktop is $579 in an early Amazon Spring deal.

item.title: The Hutt Sex Explainer You Don’t Want But Are Kind of Curious About
item.description: 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' adding Jabba the Hutt's son got you thinking too many awkward questions about how that happens? We've got you covered.

item.title: Geekom mini PC deal: 'Extremely powerful' AI mini computer crushed our benchmarks for office and content creation tasks - and it's got a $150 price cut at Best Buy
item.description: The Geekom A8 Max is the mini PC deal we recommend for business professionals and creators right now.

item.title: Insta360 Go Ultra : cette action cam POV qui filme en 4K est fournie avec son pack créateur à moins de 400 €
item.description: Insta360 a lancé l'an dernier sa nouvelle caméra d'action 4K conçue pour la prise de vue à la première personne tout en gardant les mains libres. Un modèle tout léger et performant que l'on trouve, avec son pack créateur, à 399 euros au lieu de 479 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
item.description: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.

item.title: 'The future lies in quantum-centric supercomputing': IBM reveals its next big plan for developing next-gen quantum computing, but are we any closer to real-world launches?
item.description: IBM’s quantum-centric supercomputing architecture integrates quantum processors with classical clusters to accelerate scientific discovery, although practical deployment remains largely experimental.

item.title: J’ai ajouté un deuxième écran à l’iPhone 17 Pro Max : mais pour quoi faire ?
item.description: Ajouter un écran à l'arrière de son iPhone, c'est le meilleur moyen de ne plus rater ses photos avec les meilleurs capteurs. Et ça, Selfix le propose avec une coque dédiée aux iPhone 17 Pro et 17 Pro Max que nous avons pu prendre en main.

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse
item.description: Yesterday Nvidia revealed its latest upscaling tech called DLSS 5, which it described as "the company's most significant breakthrough in computer graphics since the debut of real-time ray tracing in 2018." Sounds good, until you actually see it. According to Nvidia, the tech "infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials," but all anyone seemed to […]...

item.title: Most IT teams don't have full visibility of their IT stack, but AI is here to help
item.description: Three-quarters of companies are lacking visibility across hybrid environments as on-prem makes a comeback alongside cloud.

item.title: How to watch Arsenal vs. Leverkusen online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Arsenal vs. Leverkusen in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Zygo Z2 review: more than swimming headphones — they’re the Peloton of the pool
item.description: Radio waves over Bluetooth, and onboard workout classes — the Zygo Z2 are swimming headphones with a 'deep ecosystem' of features.

item.title: The tech trends getting buzz at SXSW 2026
item.description: At SXSW 2026, Mashable's tech editor tried every gizmo he could find, while talking to Silicon Valley leaders about the latest tech.

item.title: These Sonos Over-Ear Headphones Are $100 Off
item.description: This super comfortable headset has some top-tier active noise canceling. Unlike other headphones, it also integrates with your existing Sonos gear.

item.title: How to watch We Sell Babies online — stream FEDS season 2 episode 3 online from anywhere

item.title: Amazon's best early spring deals under $50 that are actually worth buying — tech gadgets, appliances, and outdoor tools from $8
item.description: Amazon's early spring sale is filled with best-selling deals under $50, and I've rounded up the 12 best offers that are actually worth buying.

item.title: The Dune: Part Three trailer introduces Robert Pattinson's villainous new character
item.description:
It's only been two years since Dune: Part Two took over multiplexes, but we already have a trailer for the third installment. The appropriately-named Dune: Part Three is an adaptation of Frank Herbert's Dune Messiah book from 1969. Just like the book, the latest film takes place a number of years after Dune: Part Two. "If the first movie was contemplation, a boy exploring a new world, and the second one is a war movie, this one is a thriller," according to The Hollywood Reporter. "It is action-packed and tense. More muscular.”
Despite the time jump, most primary actors are returning. This inc...

item.title: How ‘Dune: Part Three’ Is Changing the Entire ‘Dune’ Franchise
item.description: Director Denis Villeneuve spoke about the changes in his new film, which opens on December 18.

item.title: Lead producer says huge new update isn't Starfield 2.0 but still 'the best version' of the game — '2.0 isn't really how I'd describe it'
item.description: Starfield is getting two new expansions and a whole lot of improvements next month as part of a huge content update, but from Bethesda's point of view, it's not a "2.0" patch.

item.title: Antigravity’s 360-degree drone is 20 percent off ahead of its next feature drop
item.description: Insta360’s Antigravity A1 is one of the most interesting drones on the market thanks to its included Vision Goggles, which provide a 360-degree first-person view through the drone’s cameras (a screen on the outside of its lenses shows what the pilot is seeing). Its cameras can shoot 8K video at 30 frames per second, or […]

item.title: Beat the RAM price hikes with three Corsair Vengeance memory deals from $242 in Best Buy's tech sale
item.description: I'm seeing price cuts on Corsair's DDR4 and DDR5 memory kits in Best Buy's Tech Fest Sale.

item.title: Arizona attorney general sues Kalshi on illegal gambling charges
item.description: Kalshi has been sued by Arizona's attorney general for operating an illegal gambling business in the state and unlawfully ‌allowing people to place bets on elections. "Kalshi may brand itself as a 'prediction ⁠market,' but what it's actually doing is running an illegal gambling operation ​and taking bets on Arizona elections, both of which violate Arizona law," the state's Attorney General Kris Mayes said. The company defines itself as a prediction markets platform, where users make bets on the outcomes of events ranging from sporting matches to political actions. Kalshi has claimed that it op...

item.title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
item.description: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.

item.title: Box fibre RED by SFR, Nothing Phone (4a) Pro, Rowenta Eclipse : les 3 meilleurs bons plans tech de ce mardi 17 mars 2026
item.description: Nous sommes le mardi 17 mars 2026 et la journée réserve de belles surprises du côté des bons plans tech. Voici ceux qui valent le détour.

item.title: Teens sue xAI for Groks reported sexual image generation issues
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI and AI tool Grok is getting sued for generating sexualized images of children.

item.title: How to watch Chelsea vs PSG: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League Round of 16 2nd leg, team news
item.description: All the ways to watch Chelsea vs PSG live streams from anywhere and for free, as the defending champions travel to London with a three-goal advantage.
